SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlotterysystem.model

Class EntrantListEntry

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlotterysystem.model.EntrantListEntry
public class EntrantListEntry extends Object
This class is used to represent an entry in the waitlist for an event. Stored in Firestore

  • Constructor Details

    • EntrantListEntry

      public EntrantListEntry()
      empty consructor used by firestore

    • EntrantListEntry

      public EntrantListEntry(String eventId, String entrantId)
      constructor used by app to create a new waitlist entry
      Parameters:
      eventId - The id of the event to add to the waitlist for.
      entrantId - The id of the entrant to add to the waitlist.

    • EntrantListEntry

      public EntrantListEntry(String eventId, String entrantId, int status)
      constructor used by app to create a new waitlist entry
      Parameters:
      eventId - The id of the event to add to the waitlist for.
      entrantId - The id of the entrant to add to the waitlist.
      status - The status of the waitlist entry.(1-WAITLIST, 2-INVITED, etc.)

    • EntrantListEntry

      public EntrantListEntry(String eventId, String entrantId, int status, Double latitude, Double longitude)
